title: Runtime Features Event
description: Feature-store values a strategy actually consumed from QS-Datamaster at decision time. Captured per bar so the v3 audit export can project a runtime_feature_* namespace distinct from the static feature_* namespace sourced from ClickHouse directly.

strategy_id.description: Strategy that consumed these runtime features

symbol.description: Security symbol the features were consumed for

sleeve_id.description: Optional stable sleeve identifier for isolated ensemble attribution.

timestamp.description: Bar timestamp for which the features were read (ISO 8601 with timezone)

runtime_features.description: Dictionary of feature name -> value the strategy consumed. Values are completely flexible (numeric, boolean, string, array, nested object) to match Datamaster feature-store shapes. Keys should match the original feature-store column names; collisions across get_features/get_indicators/get_regime are last-write-wins within a single bar.

metadata.description: Optional provenance metadata (e.g., source table, feature_set_version).
